rows.label: qev060608_MSG0001
rows.name: Zaruboggan really grow up fast, don't they...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060608_MSG0002
rows.name: Arsenican's child seems to have become a full-fledged adult already.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060608_MSG0003
rows.name:
He grew up to be so serious...
I'd love for him to work at the waste processing tank someday.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060608_MSG0004
rows.name: Zaruboggan really grow up fast, don't they...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060608_MSG0005
rows.name: Arsenican's child seems to have become a full-fledged adult already.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev060608_MSG0006
rows.name:
Rather than a Zaruboggan, his way of speaking makes him seem exactly like a friendly Earthling.
It felt like we could become really good friends.[ST:wait ]
